languages.text: While in a trench, ranged attacks from weapons and turret against you outside of trenches suffer reduced effectiveness.

traits.locale_text: While in a trench, ranged attacks from weapons and turret against you outside of trenches suffer reduced effectiveness.

languages.text: When a creature takes {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}cover{/g} in a trench, all ranged attacks from weapons and turrets fired outside the trench at the creature are made with an extra penalty to hit chance and damage.
languages.original_text: While in a trench, ranged attacks from weapons and turret against you outside of trenches suffer reduced effectiveness.

traits.locale_text: When a creature takes cover in trenches, all ranged attacks from weapons and turrets fired outside the trench are made with an extra accuracy and damage penalty.

When a creature takes {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}cover{/g} in a trench, all ranged attacks from weapons and turrets fired outside the trench at the creature are made with an extra penalty to hit chance and damage.

When a creature takes {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}cover{/g} in a trench, all ranged attacks from weapons and turrets fired outside the trench at the creature are made with an extra penalty to hit chance and damage.

languages.text: Когда существо прячется за {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}укрытием{/g} в окопе, все дистанционные атаки оружием и турелями извне окопа по этому существу получают дополнительный штраф к шансу попадания и урону.
languages.original_text: When a creature takes {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}cover{/g} in a trench, all ranged attacks from weapons and turrets fired outside the trench at the creature are made with an extra penalty to hit chance and damage.

traits.locale_text: Когда существо прячется за {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}укрытием{/g} в окопе, все дистанционные атаки оружием и турелями извне окопа по этому существу получают дополнительный штраф к шансу попадания и урону.

Когда существо прячется за {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}укрытием{/g} в окопе, все дистанционные атаки оружием и турелями извне окопа по этому существу получают дополнительный штраф к шансу попадания и урону.

languages.text: Geht eine Kreatur in einem Schützengraben in {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}Deckung{/g}, haben alle außerhalb des Grabens abgefeuerten Waffen und Geschütze einen zusätzlichen Abzug auf Trefferchance und Schaden.
languages.original_text: When a creature takes {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}cover{/g} in a trench, all ranged attacks from weapons and turrets fired outside the trench at the creature are made with an extra penalty to hit chance and damage.

traits.locale_text: Geht eine Kreatur in einem Schützengraben in {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}Deckung{/g}, haben alle außerhalb des Grabens abgefeuerten Waffen und Geschütze einen zusätzlichen Abzug auf Trefferchance und Schaden.

languages.text: Cuando una criatura se pone {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}a cubierto{/g} en una trinchera, todos los ataques a distancia de armas y torretas que se disparen desde fuera de la trinchera contra ella se realizan con una penalización adicional a probabilidad de impacto y daño.
languages.original_text: When a creature takes {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}cover{/g} in a trench, all ranged attacks from weapons and turrets fired outside the trench at the creature are made with an extra penalty to hit chance and damage.

traits.locale_text: Cuando una criatura se pone {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}a cubierto{/g} en una trinchera, todos los ataques a distancia de armas y torretas que se disparen desde fuera de la trinchera contra ella se realizan con una penalización adicional a probabilidad de impacto y daño.

languages.text: Bir yaratık, bir hendekte {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}siper{/g} aldığında hendeğin dışındaki silah ve taretlerden yaratığa yapılan tüm menzilli saldırılar, vuruş olasılığı ve hasar değerlerine ek ceza puanıyla yapılır.
languages.original_text: When a creature takes {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}cover{/g} in a trench, all ranged attacks from weapons and turrets fired outside the trench at the creature are made with an extra penalty to hit chance and damage.

traits.locale_text: Bir yaratık, bir hendekte {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}siper{/g} aldığında hendeğin dışındaki silah ve taretlerden yaratığa yapılan tüm menzilli saldırılar, vuruş olasılığı ve hasar değerlerine ek ceza puanıyla yapılır.

languages.text: 当生物在战壕中使用{g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}掩体{/g}时，所有从战壕外向其射击的武器和炮台远程攻击都会受到额外的命中率和伤害减值。
languages.original_text: When a creature takes {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}cover{/g} in a trench, all ranged attacks from weapons and turrets fired outside the trench at the creature are made with an extra penalty to hit chance and damage.

traits.locale_text: 当生物在战壕中使用{g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}掩体{/g}时，所有从战壕外向其射击的武器和炮台远程攻击都会受到额外的命中率和伤害减值。

languages.text: Quand une créature se {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}met à couvert{/g} dans une tranchée, toutes les attaques à distance des armes et tourelles qui tirent sur la créature depuis l'extérieur de la tranchée subissent une pénalité supplémentaire de chances de toucher et de dégâts.
languages.original_text: When a creature takes {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}cover{/g} in a trench, all ranged attacks from weapons and turrets fired outside the trench at the creature are made with an extra penalty to hit chance and damage.

traits.locale_text: Quand une créature se {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}met à couvert{/g} dans une tranchée, toutes les attaques à distance des armes et tourelles qui tirent sur la créature depuis l'extérieur de la tranchée subissent une pénalité supplémentaire de chances de toucher et de dégâts.

languages.text: クリーチャーが塹壕に{g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}隠れ{/g}ている時は、塹壕の外から武器や砲台で攻撃すると、命中率とダメージにペナルティが加算される。
languages.original_text: When a creature takes {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}cover{/g} in a trench, all ranged attacks from weapons and turrets fired outside the trench at the creature are made with an extra penalty to hit chance and damage.

traits.locale_text: クリーチャーが塹壕に{g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}隠れ{/g}ている時は、塹壕の外から武器や砲台で攻撃すると、命中率とダメージにペナルティが加算される。
